response.reasoning: The candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Strong match on TypeScript/Node.js (current role at re:cinq, plus Optilyz and RIDE Capital). React experience confirmed at Optilyz. MongoDB and MySQL covered; SQL listed. Docker and Kubernetes mentioned (GISCollective on k8s). AWS CDK experience at Optilyz. Git proficiency clear from GitHub/GitLab presence. Strong TDD/testing background (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course, TDD at RIDE). AI agent experience explicitly mentioned at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflows). Has BS in Computer Science. Multiple languages: TypeScript, Java, C++, C#, PHP, DLang, Swift — Python not explicitly listed though. Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned, but given the depth of Node/TS work these are easily learnable. Kotlin not mentioned but Java is. Communication skills demonstrated through workshops/talks. Overall a very strong senior fullstack candidate with bonus AI agent experience.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with strong TypeScript/Node.js + React track record
Explicit AI agent / MCP infrastructure experience at current role
Deep testing/TDD culture (built test frameworks, taught courses)
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly listed in resume
No Kotlin experience (Java only) for secondary stack
Python not mentioned among the listed languages
response.justification: Strong senior fullstack candidate with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple Berlin companies, explicit AI agent infrastructure work matching a key requirement, a CS degree, and a notable testing/TDD background. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are minor and easily bridged given the breadth of languages and frameworks already demonstrated.
